import React from "react"; import { Col, Row } from "react-bootstrap"; import { SiLinux, SiVisualstudiocode, SiDocker, SiKubernetes, SiJenkins, SiAnsible, SiTerraform, SiAmazonaws, SiGitlab, SiGit, SiNginx, SiHelm, SiPrometheus, SiGrafana, } from "react-icons/si"; function Toolstack() { return (
Linux
Git
Docker
Kubernetes
Helm
Jenkins
Ansible
Terraform
AWS
GitLab
Nginx
Prometheus
Grafana
VS Code
 ); } export default Toolstack;
